title: Sgn Function
description: The Sgn function determines the sign of the numeric value of the operand.
see_also:
Abs	Not

And	Sin

Atan	Sqr

Atan2	Str$

Cos	Tan

Int	Val

Mod	Xor

Or

Sgn Function Example

This is a simple command window example on the usage of the Sgn function.

>print sgn(123)

1

>print sgn(-123)

-1

>
